case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-180s metrics. Productcatalogservice latency (dev=+3.0), checkoutservice mem (dev=+1.7), and currencyservice socket (dev=+2.7) anomalies detected. Productcatalogservice latency shows strongest deviation. Ranking top1=productcatalogservice_latency

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-180s productcatalogservice metrics. Latency.p90 (dev=+3.0) and latency.p50 (dev=+2.7) show strongest anomalies. Traces show elevated call counts from frontend and recommendationservice. Ranking confirms productcatalogservice_latency as top cause.
Productcatalogservice latency.p90/p50 anomalies (dev=+3.0/+2.7) with elevated frontend/recommendationservice traces confirm latency as root cause. No secondary candidates identified.
